introSection:
Toboggan was a steel roller coaster located at Lakemont Park in Altoona, Pennsylvania, USA. It operated from 1991 to 2016. Prior to arriving at Lakemont Park, it travelled with Deggeller Shows. It was manufactured in 1963.

In November 2017, it was listed for sale at $25,000 and in August 2018 the roller coaster was sold.
fullText:
Toboggan was a steel roller coaster located at Lakemont Park in Altoona, Pennsylvania, USA. It operated from 1991 to 2016. Prior to arriving at Lakemont Park, it travelled with Deggeller Shows. It was manufactured in 1963.

In November 2017, it was listed for sale at $25,000 and in August 2018 the roller coaster was sold.
